[2018-03-12 22:34] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Holds an Attack and spares a Red for Burst attack, 4 Attack every 2nd turn.
[2018-03-12 22:35] mqp: Crystallizer (3RR, 1 supply) 2 HP
At the start of your turn, gain G for every Animus you own.
Click, sacrifice Crystallizer: Gain 1B for every Animus you own.
[2018-03-12 22:35] mqp: i hope that counts as using it in multiple ways
[2018-03-12 22:36] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Turn ability is bad.
[2018-03-12 22:37] mqp: i agree, you probably didn't want to buy it on a single animus unless you intended on clicking it later
[2018-03-12 22:38] mqp: but i bet that in most mono-red games you ought to buy it at some point and click it at some point
[2018-03-12 22:38] mqp: and in double red games you sure as heck do
[2018-03-12 22:38] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Click ability is worse.
[2018-03-12 22:41] mqp: hmm i'm worried only that you might end up wanting to click it immediately too often
[2018-03-12 22:42] mqp: now i think you might buy it earlier in some red games in place of a conduit and leave it around
[2018-03-12 22:42] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): No, it's a Conduit Ferritin.
[2018-03-12 22:42] mqp: ok actually i'm toasting this unit i don't like it anymore
[2018-03-12 22:42] f300xen (f0x): seems too set-dependent
[2018-03-12 22:43] mqp: i still aspire to produce a good unit for this contest
[2018-03-12 22:44] http404error: An econ unit is a cool idea
[2018-03-12 22:44] http404error: Do we have any econ defenders in the game yet?
[2018-03-12 22:44] http404error: We have econ attackers and attacking defenders
[2018-03-12 22:46] http404error: Not really, dgrid is more a midgame unit
[2018-03-12 22:46] Deleted User (Deleted User): Aguara 15 :Gold: :Green: :Blue: :Red: 4 :Health: 1 Supply
Every turn, choose 2:
- :Blocker: 
- Gain :Attack: :Attack: 
- Gain 4 :Chill: 
- Gain 5 :Gold: 
- Construct :Drone: :Drone:
[2018-03-12 22:47] mqp: Bleeding Wall (13R, 1 supply) 6 HP
Prompt
At the start of your turn, Bleeding Wall loses 1 HP and you gain RR.
[2018-03-12 22:48] mqp: i like this one because if you are going along building red attackers, the time you might want to buy this for the absorb is also about the time when you're not jazzed about using all your red anymore
[2018-03-12 22:49] mqp: so it really makes u think
[2018-03-12 22:49] mqp: adjusted to RR so that it's less obvious that you should use it for soak if you have a red sink
[2018-03-12 22:50] mqp: and so that red sink is more obligatory to find
[2018-03-12 22:51] mqp: maybe too oppressive synergy with big red attackers though
[2018-03-12 22:51] mqp: adjusted to 13R to make red openings annoying and awkward
[2018-03-12 22:52] http404error: I like the idea of giving red a temporary but strong absorber
[2018-03-12 22:52] http404error: I'd be tempted to drop it to 4:Health: and cheapen the cost though
[2018-03-12 22:53] mqp: maybe. it might be impossible to really make it fun.
[2018-03-12 22:53] mqp: the theme is cute but giving big red two crucial tools at once is a little much
[2018-03-12 22:54] http404error: The idea is what counts
[2018-03-12 22:54] http404error: I think it's possible to balance that idea
[2018-03-12 22:55] http404error: You could also just add blue to the cost lol
[2018-03-12 22:56] http404error: You can have whatever time you need to make a submission you're happy with before I call time
[2018-03-12 22:57] http404error: @Deleted User It's cute but UI for that is so not happening
[2018-03-12 22:59] mqp: Infested Command Center (2BR, 1 supply) 3 HP
Blocker
Click, sacrifice an Engineer: Create 2 Nitrocybes with buildtime 2.
[2018-03-12 23:00] mqp: i know it only does one thing so it's not eligible for the challenge, but i sure like the one thing it does
[2018-03-12 23:00] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Ninja (1.2): Supply 4. Cost: 13:Gold: :Blue::Red:.
:Health:3. :Blocker:.
Turn: Get 2:Attack:. 1:Attack: will be :Click: if 0:Stamina:.
2:Stamina::Click:: Pay 2:Attack: :Blue:, build :Prompt: Shuriken.
[2018-03-12 23:03] http404error: Nitrocybes do two things already. You can make it a Blocker to make it possibly not want to be clicked either
[2018-03-12 23:03] http404error: Add some gold cost, push hp to 4 even
[2018-03-12 23:04] http404error: I really like the design
[2018-03-12 23:04] mqp: i really like the design too it would be super fun to figure out how bad i wanted to click that
[2018-03-12 23:04] http404error: I already really liked Swarm Construct, at least
[2018-03-12 23:05] mqp: i'll make it a blocker and you can call it my entry

[2018-03-13 01:43] http404error: The winner of the first-ever Unit Design Challenge is:
@mqp
Infested Command Center (2:Gold::Blue::Red:, 1 supply) 3:Health:
Blocker (:Blocker:)
:Click:: Consume an Engineer to create 2 Nitrocybes with buildtime 2:Time:

Runner-up:
@RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)
Volatile Refinery (2:Gold::Green::Red:, 1 supply) 5:Fragile:
As an additional cost to play Volatile Refinery, sacrifice a :Conduit: and an :Animus: 
Start of turn: Gain :Green::Red::Red:
End of turn: Convert any unspent :Red: into :Green:
:Click:: Pay 6 :Green: to construct 3 Gauss Charges

The next challenge will be to **create a unit that influences your turn 1 buying decision** and will run until Thursday at around this time!
[2018-03-13 01:43] mqp: great, next challenge is to create a unit that you will have to wonder whether or not to buy on turn 1
[2018-03-13 01:45] http404error: (I took the liberty of giving Meth Lab an interim name and hp, at @RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)'s request. objections can be filed in my PMs)
[2018-03-13 01:45] http404error: Oh it's absolutely rigged.
[2018-03-13 01:45] http404error: The other designs all had promising things but didn't come together into the same kind of promising package.
[2018-03-13 01:46] http404error: Also inb4 someone submits Wild Drone
[2018-03-13 01:47] http404error: Drone variants are of course a frontrunner, but I could see other types of units contending.
[2018-03-13 01:47] mqp: things that aren't drone variants will get a creativity bonus
[2018-03-13 01:48] http404error: They have to actually be good unit designs still though, which makes that harder than it's worth
[2018-03-13 01:49] http404error: I mean sure, if I see a super-fun and awesome sometimes-turn-1-pick that doesn't produce gold, sure it probably will win, but I'm not sure such a unit exists.
[2018-03-13 01:49] http404error: I guess something kind of Saviorish is maybe the best candidate
